records.name: Xenolord (Ultra) Slab Fragment
records.description:
Fragment overflowing with <characterName id=|DarkMechaDragon|/>'s energy.
Combine all of them to create a Slab.

records.name: Xenolord Slab Fragment
records.description:
Fragment depicting <characterName id=|DarkMechaDragon|/>.
Combine all of them to create a Slab.

records.name: Yakumo Statue Schematic
records.description: When in inventory or stored in a base, allows you to build <MapObjectName id=|GuardianDogStatue|/>.

records.name: Curve Module
records.description:
Equipping it causes the sphere to spin with a curved trajectory. 
It becomes easier to catch Pals off guard, and increases capture power.

records.name: Heavy Weight Module
records.description: Equipping it makes the sphere heavier, reducing its range but increasing its capture power.

records.name: Homing Module
records.description: Equipping it makes the sphere home in on Pals, further increasing capture power.

records.name: Slider Module
records.description:
Equipping it adds a slider spin to the sphere. 
The sphere curves at a sharp angle, making it easier to catch Pals off guard and increasing capture power.

records.name: Sniper Module
records.description: Equipping it increases the sphere's range, allowing it to sharply capture Pals and enhancing capture power.

records.name: Sniper Module II
records.description: Equipping it significantly increases the sphere's range, allowing it to sharply capture Pals and enhancing capture power.

records.name: Advanced Recovery Meds
records.description:
Medicine that heals wounds over time.
Extremely high quality, it rapidly restores HP before your eyes.

records.name: Advanced Technical Manual
records.description:
A book that contains secrets of amazing technology.
Use it to obtain a few Technology Points.

records.name: Alluring Bait
records.description:
Bait that lures in Pals. 
Improved to enlarge the size of the bar in the fishing minigame and increase the number of items obtained from fishing.

records.name: Ancient Technical Manual
records.description:
A book that contains long-lost secrets of technology from a forgotten era.
Use it to obtain Ancient Technology Points.

records.name: Applied Cooling Handbook I
records.description:
A rare book written about the secrets of <uiCommon id=|COMMON_WORK_SUITABILITY_Cool|/>. 
Allowing a Pal to read it permanently increases their <uiCommon id=|COMMON_WORK_SUITABILITY_Cool|/> affinity by +1.

Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry.
Carrying one is enough.

will ride on your head and fire at enemies.

records.name: Baked Berries
records.description:
Cooking enhances their nutritional value,
and surprisingly, they are quite filling.

records.name: Baked Mushroom
records.description:
Cooking this mushroom enhances its nutritional value.
Curiously, it's also quite filling.

records.name: Bread
records.description:
<itemName id=|Pan|/> made from baked <itemName id=|Flour|/>.
A tasty staple food.

records.name: Broiled Dumud
records.description:
Grilled fish slathered with a secret sauce.
Soothes both mind and body.
Perfect for tired Pal Tamers.

records.name: Broncherry Fried Noodles
records.description:
A dish made by stir-frying noodles with vegetables and meat. 
The rich seasoning pairs perfectly with the thick cuts of meat. Eating it will increase your <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_Attack|/> by 20% for a period of time.

records.name: Broncherry Meat
records.description:
<characterName id=|SakuraSaurus|/> meat.
Giant meat full of massive stores of energy.
Stuffed to the brim with nutrients gathered through photosynthesis.

records.name: Broncherry Rib Roast
records.description:
Grilled meat brimming with the flavor of the king of the wilds.
Juices from the compressed meat flow from the bone,
making it surprisingly tender despite the initial toughness.

records.name: Cake
records.description:
A dish eaten during celebrations. 
Put it in the chest at a <mapObjectName id=|BreedFarm|/> to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg.

records.name: Caprity Meat
records.description:
<characterName id=|BerryGoat|/> meat.
Healthy and full of nutrients.
Hints of berries scenting the meat stimulates the appetite.

records.name: Caramel Cotton Candy
records.description:
Caramel cotton candy collected from <characterName id=|SweetsSheep_Ground|/>.
Its fluffy sweetness melts away in your mouth.

records.name: Carbonara
records.description:
A dish mixing pasta with <itemName id=|Egg|/> and <itemName id=|Milk|/>.
Eating it makes it improves <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/> by +20% for a period of time.

records.name: Carrot
records.description:
A vibrant, nutrient-rich root vegetable. 
Not suitable for raw consumption.

records.name: Cavern Mushroom
records.description:
Mushroom that grows prolifically in caves.
Can be made into healing medicine.

records.name: Chikipi Poultry
records.description:
<characterName id=|ChickenPal|/> meat.
Light and easy to eat,
it's a local favorite for residents of Palpagos Island.

records.name: Chikipi Sauté
records.description:
Plump poultry sautéed in butter.
Accented with fresh lemons.
Eating it will slightly increase work speed for a period of time.

records.name: Cotton Candy
records.description:
Cotton candy collected from <characterName id=|SweetsSheep|/>.
Its sweetness fluffily melts away in your mouth.

records.name: Dumud Chowder
records.description:
Dumud lavishly covered in a thick, creamy soup.
Eating it will increase work speed
and stay full slightly longer for a period of time.

records.name: Egg
records.description:
Delicious when fried, but can also be used to cook various meals.
<characterName id=|ChickenPal|/> produce them.

records.name: Eikthyrdeer Loco Moco
records.description:
Thick hamburger steak accented with a creamy fried egg.
This sublime combination brings pure joy to the mouths of those who eat it.
Eating it will increase <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> by +20% for a period of time.

records.name: Eikthyrdeer Stew
records.description:
A tender, melt-in-your-mouth venison stew crafted with love.
The intertwining flavors of vegetables and meat create a harmonious blend that brings out a comforting richness.
Eating it will increase <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/> by +20% for a period of time.

records.name: Eikthyrdeer Venison
records.description:
<characterName id=|Deer|/> meat.
Light and lean, but rich in flavor.

records.name: Extravagant Vegetable Cake
records.description:
Place it in the chest at a <mapObjectName id=|BreedFarm|/> to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg.
Mutations are more likely to occur, and talents will grow more easily.

records.name: Flour
records.description:
<itemName id=|Flour|/> made from grinding <itemName id=|Wheat|/>.
It can be used as an ingredient in making <itemName id=|Pan|/>.

records.name: French Fries
records.description:
A dish made by deep-frying <itemName id=|Potato|/>. 
Once you start eating, you can't stop. Eating it will make it harder for your SAN value to decrease for a period of time.

records.name: Fried Chikipi
records.description:
Magnificently juicy poultry.
Eating it will slightly increase work speed
and make SAN decrease slower for a period of time.

records.name: Fried Egg
records.description:
An <itemName id=|Egg|/> now fried and even more delicious.
Great for keeping hunger away.

records.name: Fried Gloopie Balls
records.description:
<itemName id=|Meat_OctopusGirl|/> encased in a <itemName id=|Flour|/> dough and grilled into round bites. 
Eating it will slightly increase EXP gain for a period of time.

records.name: Fried Kelpsea
records.description:
Crunchy fried batter perfectly accentuates the Kelpsea's plumpness.
Eating it will increase <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/> by +10%
and make SAN decrease slower for a period of time.

records.name: Galeclaw Nikujaga
records.description:
A dish made by simmering meat and potatoes in a sweet and savory sauce. 
It has a mysteriously nostalgic taste. Eating it will increase your <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/> by 25% for a period of time.

records.name: Galeclaw Poultry
records.description:
<characterName id=|Eagle|/> meat.
Full of nutrition, its flavor packs a punch.

records.name: Gloopie Tentacle
records.description:
<characterName id=|OctopusGirl|/> tentacle. 
Known for its springy texture and light, refined flavor.

records.name: Gratin
records.description:
A dish made by coating potatoes with sauce and baking them to perfection. 
Best enjoyed hot and fresh. Eating it will provide lasting fullness and increase your <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/> by 10% for a period of time.

records.name: Grilled Chikipi
records.description:
Chicken skewer slow-grilled over a charcoal fire.
Light and refreshing on the tongue.

records.name: Grilled Galeclaw
records.description: Grilled meat full of vitality for flying high in the skies.

records.name: Grilled Kelpsea
records.description:
Fresh fish grilled over a charcoal fire.
Plump and juicy.

records.name: Grilled Lamball
records.description:
Marinated mutton slow-cooked over a grill.
Eating it will slightly increase work speed
and make SAN decrease slightly slower for a period of time.

records.name: Herb Roasted Caprity
records.description:
Mild roast filled with the natural aromas of
herbs and berries embedded in the meat.
Gives a pleasant sense of warmth when eaten outdoors.

records.name: Herb Roasted Lamball
records.description:
Indulging in an abundance of fresh berries
creates a tantalizing aroma that accentuates the unique flavor of mutton.
Eating it will increase <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/> by +10% for a period of time.

records.name: Honey
records.description:
Honey harvested from <characterName id=|SoldierBee|/>.
It's sweet and tasty.

records.name: Hot Milk
records.description:
Even more delicious when warmed up.
Great for keeping hunger away.

records.name: Jam-Filled Bun
records.description:
<itemName id=|Pan|/> with jam spread on it.
The sweetness of the berries complements it perfectly.

records.name: Jelliette Bell Flesh
records.description:
<characterName id=|JellyfishFairy|/>'s fleshy bell. 
Packed with ocean flavor and a delightfully chewy bite.

records.name: Jelliette's Jiggly Jelly
records.description:
An unusual treat crafted from <itemName id=|Meat_JellyfishFairy|/> and <itemName id=|PalFluid|/>. 
Eating it will slightly increase EXP gain and increase <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> by +10% for a period of time.

records.name: Jellroy Bell Flesh
records.description:
<characterName id=|JellyfishGhost|/>'s fleshy bell. 
Packed with ocean flavor and a delightfully plump texture.

records.name: Jellroy's Jolly Jelly
records.description:
An unusual treat crafted from <itemName id=|Meat_JellyfishGhost|/> and <itemName id=|Berries|/>. 
Eating it will slightly increase EXP gain and increase <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/> by +10% for a period of time.

records.name: Lamball Kebab
records.description:
Spiced and roasted mutton.
Deeply complex with unique flavors.

records.name: Lamball Mutton
records.description:
<characterName id=|SheepBall|/> meat.
Red meat with a unique flavor.
Delicious, but takes some getting used to.

records.name: Lettuce
records.description:
A leafy green. When it comes to salad, this is a must.
It has an exquisitely crunchy texture and refreshing taste.

records.name: Mammorest Curry
records.description:
A dish made by simmering vegetables and meat with spices. 
The rich flavor is highlighted by large chunks of tender meat. Eating it will increase your <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> by 25% for a period of time.

records.name: Mammorest Meat
records.description:
<characterName id=|GrassMammoth|/> meat.
With massive size comes massive flavor.
Its overwhelming portions are sure to satisfy any glutton.

records.name: Mammorest Steak
records.description:
Boasts a rich and dignified flavor.
Memories of glaciers and deep forests come rushing back with every bite.

records.name: Marinated Mushrooms
records.description:
A dish made by marinating <itemName id=|Mushroom|/>s in a marinade.
Eating it improves <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/> by +10% for a period of time.

records.name: Milk
records.description:
Drink it as is, or use it in various meals.
Can be milked from <characterName id=|CowPal|/>.

records.name: Minestrone
records.description:
A soup simmered with a variety of vegetables. 
Drinking it warms you to the core. Eating it will increase your work speed for a period of time.

records.name: Mozzarina Cheeseburger
records.description:
Now with cheese, this dish has reached the highest level of fine cuisine.
Eating it will increase <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> by +20%
and stay full longer for a period of time.

records.name: Mozzarina Hamburger
records.description:
The rich flavor of beef melds with the sweetness of the buns in perfect harmony in this masterpiece.
Eating it will increase work speed
and make SAN decrease slightly slower for a period of time.

records.name: Mozzarina Meat
records.description:
<characterName id=|CowPal|/> meat.
Thick, juicy and marbled.
Residents of Palpagos Island cherish it above all other meats.

records.name: Mozzarina Steak
records.description:
Thick, well-done steak.
Strong flavors give those who eat it an energy boost.

records.name: Munchill Meat
records.description:
<characterName id=|IceCrocodile|/> meat. 
Has a satisfying chew that brings out layers of umami as you eat.

records.name: Munchill Steak
records.description:
Charcoal-grilled to perfection, this steak offers a crispy exterior and melt-in-your-mouth juiciness. 
Unique compounds seal in flavor and enhance shelf life.

records.name: Mushroom
records.description:
A mushroom that can be eaten raw.
They can be found anywhere on the island.

records.name: Mushroom Cake
records.description:
Place it in the chest at a <mapObjectName id=|BreedFarm|/> to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg.
The talents of the resulting Pals will grow slightly more easily.

records.name: Mushroom Quiche
records.description:
A dish made by baking a pastry crust filled with eggs, vegetables, mushrooms, and cream. 
It’s delicious even when cooled. Eating it will help you stay fuller for a while and make it harder for your SAN value to decrease for a period of time.

records.name: Mushroom Soup
records.description:
Cream soup made of <itemName id=|Mushroom|/>s.
Eating it allows you to stay fuller for slightly longer for a period of time.

records.name: Mysterious Mushroom
records.description:
Mushrooms that are not suitable for eating raw.
Eating makes one more prone to feeling hungry.

records.name: Omelet
records.description:
A dish made by frying an <itemName id=|Egg|/> and topping it with ketchup.
Eating it improves <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> by +10% for a period of time.

records.name: Onion
records.description:
A cherished and easy-to-grow vegetable with a rich history. 
Not suitable for eating raw.

records.name: Pancake
records.description:
A dish made by mixing <itemName id=|Flour|/> and <itemName id=|Milk|/> together then baking.
Eating it progressively decreases the rate at which one's sanity decreases for a period of time.

records.name: Pizza
records.description:
A dish made by piling <itemName id=|Berries|/>, <itemName id=|Tomato|/> and cheese on <itemName id=|Pan|/>.
Eating it slightly improves work speed and allows you to stay fuller for slightly longer for a period of time.

records.name: Potato
records.description:
A hardy and filling crop that grows in any terrain. 
Not suitable for raw consumption.

records.name: Raw Dumud
records.description:
<characterName id=|LazyCatfish|/> meat.
Fatty with a rich taste.
Has a mouthwatering plump texture.

records.name: Raw Kelpsea
records.description:
<characterName id=|Kelpie|/> meat.
Tender and slightly sweet.
Fish meat tends to spoil quickly.

records.name: Red Berries
records.description:
A versatile ingredient that is delicious raw or cooked.
They can be found anywhere on the island.

records.name: Reindrix Stew
records.description:
Stewed vegetables and venison that was reared in a frigid environment.
The meat's soft texture melts away to reveal a delicate sweetness.
Eating it will stay full slightly longer for a period of time.

records.name: Reindrix Venison
records.description:
<characterName id=|IceDeer|/> meat.
Strange venison capable of remaining at low temperatures.
Takes a very long time to spoil.

records.name: Roast Eikthyrdeer
records.description:
Carefully roasted venison with delicate flavor notes,
accented by the aromas of the deep forest.
Elegant taste for an elegant lifestyle.

records.name: Roast Reindrix
records.description:
When taken from a flame, Reindrix meat rapidly drops in temperature.
This allows it to retain freshness for long periods of time,
making it a perfect emergency ration.

records.name: Roast Rushoar
records.description:
Boar grilled over a hearty flame.
Crispy on the outside, juicy on the inside.
Perfect as an extravagant main dish for a big party.

records.name: Rushoar Bacon 'n' Eggs
records.description:
The smoky essence of bacon intertwines flawlessly
with the gentle texture of eggs, creating a sublime harmony of flavors.
Eating it will increase <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> by +10% for a period of time.

records.name: Rushoar Gyoza
records.description:
A dish made by wrapping a filling of mushrooms and meat in wheat flour and boiling it. The chewy texture is irresistible. 
Eating it improves your <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> by 10% for a period of time.

records.name: Rushoar Hot Dog
records.description:
Thick sausage wedged between warm buns.
The crisply seared meat and spicy flavors are to die for.
Eating it will increase <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/> by +20% for a period of time.

records.name: Rushoar Pork
records.description:
<characterName id=|Boar|/> meat.
Full of the delicious flavors of wild game.
Juicy and nutritious.

records.name: Salad
records.description:
A <itemName id=|Salad|/> made by mixing <itemName id=|Lettuce|/> and <itemName id=|Tomato|/>.
Eating it slightly improves work speed for a period of time.

records.name: Salt-Grilled Skutlass
records.description:
Fresh fillets of <characterName id=|SwordCutlassFish|/> salted and grilled into a simple dish.
When eaten, it nullifies knockback and flinching for a certain period of time.

records.name: Seafood Pasta
records.description:
Fresh pasta is tossed with fragrant seafood in this exceptional dish, using Gloopie tentacles to elevate it even further.
When eaten, it nullifies damage from explosions for a certain period of time.

records.name: Seafood Salad
records.description:
A healthy salad made with <itemName id=|Meat_OctopusGirl|/> and <itemName id=|Lettuce|/>.
Eating it will slightly increase EXP gain for a period of time.

records.name: Skutlass Sashimi
records.description:
Raw slices of <characterName id=|SwordCutlassFish|/>. 
Characterized by its supple, plump flesh.
Caution is required when preparing it due to its sword-like spine.

records.name: Special Cake
records.description:
Place it in the chest at a <mapObjectName id=|BreedFarm|/> to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg.
More likely inherit multiple passive skills from their parents.

records.name: Spring Rolls
records.description:
A dish made by wrapping vegetables and mushrooms in a thin skin and deep-frying them. 
The crispy texture is delightful. Eating it will make it harder for your SAN value to decrease and increase your <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> by 10% for a period of time.

records.name: Stewed Galeclaw
records.description:
Slow-cooked dish that exudes a burst of rich, wild flavors.
Eating it will make SAN decrease slightly slower for a period of time.

records.name: Stir-Fried Vegetables
records.description:
A dish made by stir-frying <itemName id=|Carrot|/> and <itemName id=|Onion|/>. 
A simple and delicious way to enjoy vegetables. Eating it will slightly increase your work speed and improve your <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/> by 10% for a period of time.

records.name: Tomato
records.description:
A fresh ingredient that brightens any dish.
Filled with lycopene, they’re also very healthy.

records.name: Vegetable Cake
records.description:
Place it in the chest at a <mapObjectName id=|BreedFarm|/> to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg.
Lay eggs twice at once.

records.name: Wheat
records.description:
An ingredient that forms the base of various dishes.
<itemName id=|Wheat|/> is a common crop in many parts of the world.

records.name: Giga Glider
records.description:
A glider for soaring through the air.
With its capabilities improved, it can soar at high speeds.

records.name: Glider Tera
records.description:
A glider for soaring through the air.
Its performance has been further improved, with increased speed and lift.

records.name: Mega Glider
records.description:
A glider for soaring through the air.
A mass produced commercial model, it’s decently fast.

records.name: Normal Parachute
records.description:
A glider for soaring through the air.
Cheaply made, it isn't very fast.

records.name: Wing Pack
records.description:
A portable glider that enables flight. 
Consumes <itemName id=|WingGlider_Fuel|/> to propel the user through the skies.

records.name: AI Core
records.description:
A core component essential to cutting-edge devices, enabling complex decision-making and autonomous control.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_04|/>.

records.name: Ancient Bark
records.description:
The bark of a tree that has lived for many years in extreme environments.
Even the thin bark evokes a sense of boundless vitality.

records.name: Ancient Bone
records.description:
A beast bone weathered over many years in extreme environments.
Even after losing its flesh, it still gives off a strong presence.

records.name: Ancient Civilization Core
records.description:
Core from technology that was lost long ago.
Nearly impossible to find on the Palpagos Islands, it contains a wealth of forgotten knowledge.

records.name: Ancient Civilization Parts
records.description:
Debris excavated from ancient ruins.
Contains abundant information on lost technology.
Extremely valuable, people from all walks of life are now seeking such crystals.

records.name: Ancient Lava
records.description:
A mass of lava formed over long years in extreme environments.
The sealed-in blue lava is still emitting heat.

records.name: Ancient Pal Manuscript
records.description:
An ancient manuscript written on Pal hide. It may be found by Pals during expeditions. 
Required for advancing research.

records.name: Aquatic Pal Fluids
records.description:
Bodily fluids taken from a Water Pal.
Their high viscosity makes them a handy material.

records.name: Battle Ticket
records.description:
Earned by winning solo matches in the arena. 
Collect enough and you can trade them for special rewards.

records.name: Beautiful Flower
records.description:
A plant that blooms colorful flowers.
Can be used to make <itemName id=|Opium|/> and <itemName id=|Narcotic|/>.

records.name: Berry Seeds
records.description:
Seeds that produce <itemName id=|Berries|/>.
Necessary for starting a farm.
Can be obtained when picking <itemName id=|Berries|/>.

records.name: Bio Battery
records.description:
A device that stores bio-energy as electrical power.
Used for equipment requiring high energy density.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_03|/>.

records.name: Bone
records.description:
<itemName id=|Bone|/> collected from Pals.
A valuable source of premium calcium.

records.name: Carbon Fiber
records.description:
A lightweight yet sturdy material. 
Used to create armor and other equipment.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_02|/>.

records.name: Carrot Seeds
records.description:
Seeds that produce <itemName id=|Carrot|/>.
Necessary for starting a farm.

records.name: Carrying Lotus (L)
records.description:
Large purple flower that is extremely difficult to obtain.
Needed to make Burden Elixir.

records.name: Carrying Lotus (S)
records.description:
Small purple flower that is extremely difficult to obtain.
Needed to make Burden Remedy.

records.name: Cement
records.description:
<itemName id=|Cement|/> used for creating structures and more.
Can be produced in a <mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_01|/>.

records.name: Champion's Emblem
records.description:
An emblem of glory earned through victory. 
Bearing it signifies superiority on the battlefield.

records.name: Charcoal
records.description:
<itemName id=|Charcoal|/> made from burning <itemName id=|Wood|/>.
It can be combined with <itemName id=|Sulfur|/> to create <itemName id=|Gunpowder2|/>.

records.name: Chromite
records.description:
A type of metal buried underground. 
It can be detected with a <itemName id=|MetalDetector|/> on certain islands.

records.name: Circuit Board
records.description:
Required to create precision equipment.
Can be made with a <mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_02|/>.

records.name: Cloth
records.description:
<itemName id=|Cloth|/> woven from <itemName id=|Wool|/>. 
Required to create armor.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|WorkBench|/>.

records.name: Coal
records.description:
<itemName id=|Coal|/> often found in caves and other places.
Required to create high quality metal.

records.name: Common Egg
records.description:
A <itemName id=|PalEgg_Normal_01|/>.
Something gentle moves within.
Place in a <mapObjectName id=|HatchingPalEgg|/> to incubate it.

records.name: Common Egg
records.description:
A <itemName id=|PalEgg_Normal_02|/>.
Something gentle moves within.
Place in a <mapObjectName id=|HatchingPalEgg|/> to incubate it.

records.name: Computer
records.description:
A component used in the control of automated equipment and precision machinery.
It's a key component forming the foundation of modern technology.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_03|/>.

records.name: Coralum Ingot
records.description:
An alloy made from <itemName id=|ManganeseOre|/> found on the ocean floor. 
Highly resistant to energy, making it ideal for crafting weapons.
Can be refined at <mapObjectName id=|BlastFurnace4|/>.

records.name: Coralum Ore
records.description:
A rare ore formed over countless years 
in the deep sea. 
Can be retrieved from the depths with 
a magnet and fishing rod.

records.name: Corrosive Solvent
records.description:
A dangerous chemical solvent with strong decomposing properties.
Used for precision processing and special treatments.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_02|/>.

records.name: Crude Oil
records.description:
A material that can be processed into various products.
Obtained by installing a <mapObjectName id=|OilPump|/> in an oil field.

records.name: Cryogenic Coolant
records.description:
A high-efficiency cooling medium made from special components derived from Pals.
Used to regulate temperature in high-output devices.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_02|/>.

records.name: Damp Egg
records.description:
A <itemName id=|PalEgg_Water_01|/>.
Something swims within.
Place in a <mapObjectName id=|HatchingPalEgg|/> to incubate it.

records.name: Damp Egg
records.description:
A <itemName id=|PalEgg_Water_02|/>.
Something swims within.
Place in a <mapObjectName id=|HatchingPalEgg|/> to incubate it.

records.name: Dark Egg
records.description:
A <itemName id=|PalEgg_Dark_01|/>.
Something chaotic stirs within.
Place in a <mapObjectName id=|HatchingPalEgg|/> to incubate it.

records.name: Dark Egg
records.description:
A <itemName id=|PalEgg_Dark_02|/>.
Something chaotic stirs within.
Place in a <mapObjectName id=|HatchingPalEgg|/> to incubate it.

records.name: Dark Fragment
records.description:
Dropped by some powerful <uiCommon id=|COMMON_ELEMENT_NAME_Dark|/> Pals. 
Used as a material for crafting powerful accessories and other items.

records.name: Dark Radiant Gem
records.description: A gem formed as World Tree energy accumulates within a Pal’s body. When processed, it becomes an item that releases the hidden power of Pals.

records.name: Dazzi Cloud
records.description:
Cloud dropped from a <characterName id=|RaijinDaughter|/>.
Soft and fluffy, it is used to make clothing.

records.name: Decayed Ancient Relic
records.description:
Fragments of structures and tools from an ancient civilization.
Completely decayed, with no energy remaining.

records.name: Diamond
records.description:
A rare gemstone that glows brilliantly.
Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

records.name: Dog Coin
records.description:
A mysterious coin. Apparently there are people who collect these.
A <characterName id=|MimicDog|/> will usually have them, but
for some reason, they cannot be obtained by butchering it.

records.name: Dormant Ancient Relic
records.description:
Fragments of structures and tools from an ancient civilization.
In decent condition, but almost no energy remains.

records.name: Dragon Egg
records.description:
A <itemName id=|PalEgg_Dragon_01|/>.
Something mischievous stirs within.
Place in a <mapObjectName id=|HatchingPalEgg|/> to incubate it.

records.name: Dragon Egg
records.description:
A <itemName id=|PalEgg_Dragon_02|/>.
Something mischievous stirs within.
Place in a <mapObjectName id=|HatchingPalEgg|/> to incubate it.

records.name: Dragon Radiant Gem
records.description: A gem formed as World Tree energy accumulates within a Pal’s body. When processed, it becomes an item that releases the hidden power of Pals.

records.name: Electric Egg
records.description:
An <itemName id=|PalEgg_Electricity_01|/>.
Something energetic moves within.
Place in a <mapObjectName id=|HatchingPalEgg|/> to incubate it.

records.name: Electric Egg
records.description:
An <itemName id=|PalEgg_Electricity_02|/>.
Something energetic moves within.
Place in a <mapObjectName id=|HatchingPalEgg|/> to incubate it.

records.name: Electric Organ
records.description:
Material obtainable from <uiCommon id=|COMMON_ELEMENT_NAME_Electricity|/> Pals.
It stores electricity, but requires caution when used.

records.name: Electric Radiant Gem
records.description: A gem formed as World Tree energy accumulates within a Pal’s body. When processed, it becomes an item that releases the hidden power of Pals.

records.name: Emerald
records.description:
A gemstone that glows green.
Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

records.name: Explosion-Resistant Fiber
records.description:
Fibers taken from the surface of a <characterName id=|Mothman|/>’s body.
It can reduce the impact of explosions.

records.name: Fiber
records.description:
Fiber collected from trees.
A material used when creating bows, etc.

records.name: Fire Radiant Gem
records.description: A gem formed as World Tree energy accumulates within a Pal’s body. When processed, it becomes an item that releases the hidden power of Pals.

records.name: Flame Organ
records.description:
Material obtainable from <uiCommon id=|COMMON_ELEMENT_NAME_Fire|/> Pals.
Can be used to make <itemName id=|Arrow_Fire|/> and more.

records.name: Frozen Egg
records.description:
A <itemName id=|PalEgg_Ice_01|/>.
Something cold stirs within.
Place in a <mapObjectName id=|HatchingPalEgg|/> to incubate it.

records.name: Frozen Egg
records.description:
A <itemName id=|PalEgg_Ice_02|/>.
Something cold stirs within.
Place in a <mapObjectName id=|HatchingPalEgg|/> to incubate it.

records.name: Giant Pal Soul
records.description:
The soul left behind by a highly trained Pal.
It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a <mapObjectName id=|BuildableGoddessStatue|/>.

records.name: Glistening Ancient Relic
records.description:
Fragments of structures and tools from an ancient civilization.
In very good condition, light is leaking from within.
It is overflowing with energy and emitting a glow.

records.name: Glowing Ancient Relic
records.description:
Fragments of structures and tools from an ancient civilization.
In very good condition, light is leaking from within.

records.name: Gold Coin
records.description:
Currency traded on Palpagos Island.
Can be exchanged for items or Pals with merchants.

records.name: Gorgeous Ancient Relic
records.description:
Fragments of structures and tools from an ancient civilization.
In good condition, and you can feel the energy flowing.

records.name: Grass Radiant Gem
records.description: A gem formed as World Tree energy accumulates within a Pal’s body. When processed, it becomes an item that releases the hidden power of Pals.

records.name: Ground Radiant Gem
records.description: A gem formed as World Tree energy accumulates within a Pal’s body. When processed, it becomes an item that releases the hidden power of Pals.

records.name: Gumoss Leaf
records.description:
Leaf dropped from a <characterName id=|PlantSlime|/>.
Fresh and sticky, it is used to make clothing.

records.name: Gunpowder
records.description:
<itemName id=|Gunpowder2|/> used to fire ammunition.
Required to make bullets.

records.name: Hallowed Bar
records.description:
[Tides of Terraria] 
A sacred material infused with divine energy. 
Can be used to create a variety of Terraria items.

records.name: Hardwood
records.description: High-quality wood carefully selected from sturdy trees grown in harsh environments such as deserts, volcanic regions, and snowy mountains.

records.name: Hexolite
records.description:
An alloy of <itemName id=|Chromium|/> and <itemName id=|RainbowCrystal|/>. 
Used for building advanced equipment and structures.
Can be refined at <mapObjectName id=|BlastFurnace4|/>.

records.name: Hexolite Quartz
records.description:
A rare crystal found only in Feybreak. 
Over many years, Paladium has condensed and transformed, now shining with a rainbow-like glow.

records.name: High Quality Cloth
records.description:
<itemName id=|Cloth2|/> woven from a large amount of <itemName id=|Wool|/>. 
Required to create high quality armor.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_01|/>.

records.name: High Quality Pal Oil
records.description:
High-quality oil that can be extracted from Pal.
Necessary for making <itemName id=|Polymer|/>.

records.name: High Quality Wooden Board
records.description:
Fine planks carefully carved from <itemName id=|Wood_Fine|/>.
They have beautiful wood grain and are used for structures with a luxurious feel.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_03|/>.

records.name: Horn
records.description:
<itemName id=|Horn|/> collected from Pals.
Used to create medicines and more.

records.name: Huge Common Egg
records.description:
A <itemName id=|PalEgg_Normal_05|/>.
A gentle spirit throbs within—as if a monster is about to be born.
Place in a <mapObjectName id=|HatchingPalEgg|/> to incubate it.

records.name: Huge Damp Egg
records.description:
A <itemName id=|PalEgg_Water_05|/>.
A tranquil spirit sways within—as if a monster is about to be born.
Place in a <mapObjectName id=|HatchingPalEgg|/> to incubate it.

records.name: Huge Dark Egg
records.description:

records.name: Huge Mutated Egg
records.description:

Place it in a <mapObjectName id=|HatchingPalEgg|/> to incubate it.

records.name: Huge Ominous Egg
records.description:

records.description:

records.name: Ice Radiant Gem
records.description: A gem formed as World Tree energy accumulates within a Pal’s body. When processed, it becomes an item that releases the hidden power of Pals.

records.name: Ingot
records.description:
A material required to create metal weapons and armor.
Refined from <itemName id=|CopperOre|/> using a furnace.

records.name: Katress Hair
records.description:
Hair dropped from a <characterName id=|CatMage|/>.
Soft and supple, it is used to make clothing.

records.name: Killamari Tentacle
records.description:
Tentacle dropped from a <characterName id=|NegativeOctopus|/>.
Strange in texture, it is used to make clothing.

records.description:
<itemName id=|Leather|/> taken from a Pal, it serves as a defensive material.

records.name: Leezpunk Crest
records.description:
Crest dropped from a <characterName id=|LizardMan|/>.
Sharp and pointy, it is used to make clothing.

records.name: Lettuce Seeds
records.description:
Seeds that produce <itemName id=|Lettuce|/>.
Necessary for starting a farm.
Can be purchased from a merchant.

records.name: Life Lotus (L)
records.description:
Large green flower that is extremely difficult to obtain.
Needed to make Vital Elixir.

records.name: Life Lotus (S)
records.description:
Small green flower that is extremely difficult to obtain.
Needed to make Vital Remedy.

records.name: Medium Pal Soul
records.description:
A spirit left behind by a Pal.
It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a <mapObjectName id=|BuildableGoddessStatue|/>.

records.name: Meteorite Fragment
records.description:
Fragment of a rock from outer space.
Contains large amounts of <itemName id=|Pal_Crystal_S|/>,
which can be extracted by placing it in a <mapObjectName id=|Crusher|/>.

records.name: Mythical Wood
records.description:
Rare wood imbued with the power of the World Tree.
Only skilled craftsmen are able to process it.

records.name: Nail
records.description:
Necessary for building various facilities.
Can be made with a <mapObjectName id=|WorkBench|/>.

records.name: Neutral Radiant Gem
records.description: A gem formed as World Tree energy accumulates within a Pal’s body. When processed, it becomes an item that releases the hidden power of Pals.

records.name: Nightstar Sand
records.description:
Sand that can be found in the desert at night. 
Used as a material for crafting certain accessories and other items.

records.name: Ominous Egg
records.description:
An <itemName id=|PalEgg_WorldTree_01|/>.
A mysterious egg imbued with the energy of the World Tree.
Place it in a <mapObjectName id=|HatchingPalEgg|/> to incubate it.

records.name: Ominous Egg
records.description:
An <itemName id=|PalEgg_WorldTree_02|/>.
A mysterious egg imbued with the energy of the World Tree.
Place it in a <mapObjectName id=|HatchingPalEgg|/> to incubate it.

records.name: Onion Seeds
records.description:
Seeds that produce <itemName id=|Onion|/>.
Necessary for starting a farm.

records.name: Ore
records.description:
Becomes an ingot when refined using a furnace.
Can be found in caves and other places.

records.name: Pal Metal Ingot
records.description:
A material required to create Pal Metal weapons and armor. 
Strengthened by creating an alloy incorporating Paldium.

records.name: Paldium Fragment
records.description:
Crystallized energy from the World Tree.
Capable of creating supernatural items and structures.

records.name: Paloxite
records.description:
Energy leaking from the World Tree that has crystallized after many years. 
Those without protection who touch it will instantly rust and decay.
Only those who can master its delicacy can reach the pinnacle of ancient technology.

records.name: Paloxite Ingot
records.description:
An indomitable alloy created by fusing <itemName id=|SkyIslandOre|/> and <itemName id=|WorldTreeOre|/>.
A highly rare material, crystallizing the technology of ancient civilization and the power of the World Tree.
It is vital for crafting the highest-grade equipment and structures.

records.name: Penking Plume
records.description:
Plume dropped from a <characterName id=|CaptainPenguin|/>.
Bright and colorful, it is used to make clothing.

records.name: Plasteel
records.description:
<itemName id=|Plastic|/> created by processing <itemName id=|CrudeOil|/> and metal.
Can be produced in a <mapObjectName id=|BlastFurnace3|/>.

records.name: Polymer
records.description:
<itemName id=|Polymer|/> made from refined oil. 
Required for producing various advanced items such as firearms.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_02|/>.

records.name: Potato Seeds
records.description:
Seeds that produce <itemName id=|Potato|/>.
Necessary for starting a farm.

records.name: Power Lotus (L)
records.description:
Large red flower that is extremely difficult to obtain.
Needed to make Might Elixir.

records.name: Power Lotus (S)
records.description:
Small red flower that is extremely difficult to obtain.
Needed to make Might Remedy.

records.name: Precious Claw
records.description:
Extremely sharp claws collected from Pals.
Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

records.name: Precious Dragon Stone
records.description:
A gemstone-like ball collected from Pals.
Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

records.name: Precious Entrails
records.description:
A heart that never stops beating collected from Pals.

records.name: Precious Pelt
records.description:

Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

records.name: Precious Plume
records.description:

records.name: Predator Core
records.description:
Core dropped by Predator Pals.

records.name: Pure Quartz
records.description:
<itemName id=|Quartz|/> often found in snowy fields and similar places.

records.name: Refined Ingot
records.description:

records.name: Ribbuny Ribbon
records.description:
Ribbon dropped from a <characterName id=|PinkRabbit|/>.

records.name: Rocky Egg
records.description:
A <itemName id=|PalEgg_Earth_01|/>.
Something calm stirs within.
Place in a <mapObjectName id=|HatchingPalEgg|/> to incubate it.

records.name: Rocky Egg
records.description:
A <itemName id=|PalEgg_Earth_02|/>.
Something calm stirs within.
Place in a <mapObjectName id=|HatchingPalEgg|/> to incubate it.

records.name: Ruby
records.description:

records.name: Sapphire
records.description:

records.name: Scorching Egg
records.description:
A <itemName id=|PalEgg_Fire_01|/>.
Something hot moves within.

records.name: Scorching Egg
records.description:

records.description:

Leftover residue from butchering a genetically reconstructed Pal,

records.description:
A spirit left behind by a small Pal.

records.name: Soralite
records.description:
A rare ore produced only in Sunreach.
Within its host rock of overwhelming density resides a mysterious pattern and radiance.

records.name: Soralite Ingot
records.description:
An ancient metal refined from ore that slumbers in Sunreach. 
A rare processed material, forming the foundation of high-grade equipment and structures.
Can be refined at <mapObjectName id=|AncientBlastFurnace|/>.

records.name: Speed Lotus (L)
records.description:
Large orange flower that is extremely difficult to obtain.
Needed to make Speed Elixir.

records.name: Speed Lotus (S)
records.description:
Small orange flower that is extremely difficult to obtain.

records.name: Stamina Lotus (L)
records.description:

records.name: Stamina Lotus (S)
records.description:

records.name: Stone
records.description:

<itemName id=|Sulfur|/> that can be found in volcanoes and such.

records.name: Swee Hair

records.description:

records.name: Tomato Seeds
records.description:

records.description:

records.name: Venom Gland
records.description:
Material obtainable from poisonous Pals.

records.name: Verdant Egg
records.description:
A <itemName id=|PalEgg_Leaf_01|/>.
Something lively moves within.

records.name: Verdant Egg

records.name: Ancient Sphere

records.name: Exotic Sphere
records.description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown.

records.name: Giga Sphere
records.description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown.
Able to capture moderately powerful Pals.

records.name: Hyper Sphere
records.description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown.
Enhanced capabilities allow it to capture even more powerful Pals.

records.name: Legendary Sphere
records.description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown.

records.name: Mega Sphere
records.description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown.
Its capabilities have been improved, allowing it to catch a wider range of Pals.

records.name: Pal Sphere
records.description:

This basic model is only effective on low level Pals.

records.description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown.

records.name: Ultimate Sphere
records.description:

records.name: Ultra Sphere

records.description:

Butchered Pals will be gone for good.

records.description:

records.name: Megaboost Gun
records.description:
Firing it at an allied Pal boosts their attack and defense, while hitting an enemy deals damage. 
Thanks to improvements, the boost is stronger and lasts longer, and it deals more damage to enemies.

records.name: Meowmere
records.description:
[Tides of Terraria]
According to the legend, this sword was brought back from a distant land by <characterName id=|KendoFrog|/>.
Why? We have no idea...
Fires a bouncing cat projectile with each swing to attack enemies.

records.name: Metal Axe
records.description:

records.name: Metal Bat

records.name: Metal Detector
records.description:

Deposits will become unmarked if you move too far away.

records.description:

This curious sword releases vibrant green shockwaves with each strike, allowing you to hit enemies from afar despite being a melee weapon.

records.name: Terraprisma
records.description:
[Tides of Terraria] 
A mystical sword with a rainbow-colored blade. 
Wielding it lets you summon up to nine blessed swords to fight alongside you.

records.name: Three Shot Bow
records.description:
An enhanced bow that allows three arrows to be fired simultaneously.
By some strange mechanism, it only consumes a single <itemName id=|Arrow|/> when fired.

records.name: Vortex Beater
records.description:
[Tides of Terraria]
A powerful gun fueled by unknown energy.
Fires homing missiles at regular intervals that track enemies and explode on impact.
Has a 66% chance to not consume ammo when firing.

records.name: Water Grenade
records.description:
A <itemName id=|FragGrenade_Water|/> useful for mid-range combat.
It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing <uiCommon id=|COMMON_ELEMENT_NAME_Water|/> damage to enemies.

records.name: WidePenetrateShotgun 2
records.description:
A specialized beam weapon for close-range combat.
It fires compressed energy in a wide, scattering blast.

records.name: Wooden Club
records.description:
A <itemName id=|Bat|/> for close range combat.
Can beat a small Pal to a pulp if need be.
